import { useState, useEffect } from "react";

const MEGAFONO_URL = "data:image/png;base64,";

// ─── COSTANTI ────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TAGS = ["Tutti", "Associazione", "Forum dei Giovani", "Territorio", "Evento", "Comunicato"];
const TAG_COLORS = {
  "Associazione": "#7c3aed",
  "Forum dei Giovani": "#059669",
  "Territorio": "#d97706",
  "Evento": "#dc2626",
  "Comunicato": "#0369a1",
};

const INITIAL_POSTS = [
  {
    id: 1, tag: "Associazione",
    titolo: "N.E.X.T. è ufficialmente un'APS 🎉",
    contenuto: "Siamo felici di annunciare che N.E.X.T. – Nuove Energie per il Territorio è ora un'Associazione di Promozione Sociale. Un passo concreto per radicare la nostra presenza sul territorio e costruire qualcosa che duri nel tempo, indipendente e apartitico.",
    data: "Marzo 2026", autore: "Team N.E.X.T.",
  },
  {
    id: 2, tag: "Forum dei Giovani",
    titolo: "6 seggi conquistati: inizia il nostro lavoro",
    contenuto: "Siamo minoranza nel Forum dei Giovani con 6 seggi su 16 — e lo sappiamo. Non è un problema: è il nostro punto di partenza. Porteremo le nostre proposte con voce chiara, costruiremo dialogo e saremo presenti in ogni decisione che riguarda i giovani del territorio.",
    data: "Marzo 2026", autore: "Team N.E.X.T.",
  },
];

const INITIAL_TEAM = [
  { nome: "Flavio Maria Carbonaro", ruolo: "Presidente", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Riccardo Ler", ruolo: "Vicepresidente", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Dario Ulturale", ruolo: "Tesoriere", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Francesca Santoriello", ruolo: "Segretaria", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Mattia Picariello", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Sharon Scarpetta", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Mattia Napolitano", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Nicole Melillo", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Eliana Procida", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Simranjit Singh", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Furio Cosenza", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
  { nome: "Ciro Nicolò Borrelli", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" },
];

const RUOLO_COLORS = {
  "Presidente": "#f5c800",
  "Vicepresidente": "#d97706",
  "Tesoriere": "#059669",
  "Segretaria": "#7c3aed",
  "Socio fondatore": "#374151",
};

const ADMIN_CODE = "next2026";

// ─── ICONA MEGAFONO ──────────────────────────────────────────
function MegafonoIcon({ size = 36 }) {
  return (
    <img
      src={MEGAFONO_URL}
      alt="N.E.X.T."
      style={{ width: size, height: size, objectFit: "contain", flexShrink: 0 }}
    />
  );
}

// ─── LOGO ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Logo({ onClick }) {
  return (
    <button onClick={onClick} style={{ background: "none", border: "none", cursor: onClick ? "pointer" : "default", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 10, padding: 0 }}>
      <MegafonoIcon size={38} />
      <div>
        <div style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, 'Arial Black', sans-serif", fontSize: 22, color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 3, lineHeight: 1 }}>N.E.X.T.</div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 9, color: "#a78bfa", letterSpacing: 1.5, textTransform: "uppercase", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Nuove Energie per il Territorio</div>
      </div>
    </button>
  );
}

// ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function Nav({ page, onNavigate, isAdmin }) {
  return (
    <nav style={{
      position: "sticky", top: 0, zIndex: 100,
      background: "rgba(8,2,16,0.96)", backdropFilter: "blur(16px)",
      borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.12)",
      padding: "12px 20px", display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 8,
    }}>
      <Logo onClick={() => onNavigate("home")} />
      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
        {[
          { key: "home", label: "Home" },
          { key: "bacheca", label: "Bacheca" },
          { key: "team", label: "Team" },
          { key: "admin", label: isAdmin ? "⚙️ Admin" : "Admin" },
        ].map(({ key, label }) => (
          <button key={key} onClick={() => onNavigate(key)} style={{
            background: page === key ? "#f5c800" : "transparent",
            color: page === key ? "#1a0030" : (key === "admin" && isAdmin ? "#f5c800" : "#888"),
            border: `1px solid ${page === key ? "#f5c800" : "#2a2a2a"}`,
            borderRadius: 20, padding: "5px 14px", fontSize: 12, cursor: "pointer",
            fontWeight: page === key ? "bold" : "normal", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
            transition: "all 0.2s",
          }}>{label}</button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </nav>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PAGINA HOME
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function HomePage({ onNavigate }) {
  const [vis, setVis] = useState(false);
  useEffect(() => { setTimeout(() => setVis(true), 60); }, []);

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#080210" }}>
      {/* HERO */}
      <div style={{
        minHeight: "100vh", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column",
        alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
        padding: "110px 24px 60px", textAlign: "center", position: "relative", overflow: "hidden",
      }}>
        {/* cerchi decorativi */}
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: "20%", left: "50%", transform: "translateX(-50%)", width: 600, height: 600, borderRadius: "50%", background: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,200,0,0.07) 0%, transparent 65%)", pointerEvents: "none" }} />
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "8%", right: "5%", width: 300, height: 300, borderRadius: "50%", background: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(124,58,237,0.1) 0%, transparent 70%)", pointerEvents: "none" }} />
        <div style={{ position: "absolute", top: "30%", left: "3%", width: 200, height: 200, borderRadius: "50%", background: "radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,200,0,0.05) 0%, transparent 70%)", pointerEvents: "none" }} />

        <div style={{ opacity: vis ? 1 : 0, transform: vis ? "none" : "translateY(28px)", transition: "all 0.9s ease" }}>
          {/* megafono grande */}
          <div style={{ marginBottom: 28 }}>
            <MegafonoIcon size={90} />
          </div>

          {/* badge */}
          <div style={{
            display: "inline-flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 8,
            background: "rgba(124,58,237,0.15)", border: "1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.4)",
            borderRadius: 20, padding: "6px 18px", marginBottom: 28,
            fontSize: 11, color: "#a78bfa", letterSpacing: 2, textTransform: "uppercase", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
          }}>✦ Associazione di Promozione Sociale · Campania</div>

          <h1 style={{
            fontFamily: "Impact, 'Arial Black', sans-serif",
            fontSize: "clamp(56px, 13vw, 108px)",
            color: "#f5c800", margin: "0 0 6px", letterSpacing: 6, lineHeight: 1,
            textShadow: "5px 5px 0 rgba(59,7,100,0.7)",
          }}>N.E.X.T.</h1>

          <div style={{ fontSize: "clamp(13px, 2.5vw, 18px)", color: "#c4b5fd", letterSpacing: 4, marginBottom: 28, textTransform: "uppercase", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>
            Nuove Energie per il Territorio
          </div>

          <p style={{ maxWidth: 540, margin: "0 auto 44px", color: "#6b7280", fontSize: 17, lineHeight: 1.85, fontFamily: "Georgia, serif" }}>
            Un'associazione apartitica e indipendente che lavora per la partecipazione civica,
            la cultura e la valorizzazione dei giovani e delle comunità del territorio.
          </p>

          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 14, justifyContent: "center", flexWrap: "wrap" }}>
            <button onClick={() => onNavigate("bacheca")} style={{
              background: "#f5c800", color: "#1a0030", border: "none", borderRadius: 10,
              padding: "13px 30px", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: "bold", cursor: "pointer",
              boxShadow: "0 0 32px rgba(245,200,0,0.25)", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
            }}>📋 Ultime notizie</button>
            <button onClick={() => onNavigate("team")} style={{
              background: "transparent", color: "#f5c800", border: "2px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.6)",
              borderRadius: 10, padding: "13px 30px", fontSize: 15, fontWeight: "bold", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
            }}>👥 Chi siamo</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* VALORI */}
      <div style={{ background: "rgba(245,200,0,0.03)", borderTop: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.08)", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.08)", padding: "64px 24px" }}>
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 840, margin: "0 auto" }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 48 }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 4, textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 10, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Cosa siamo</div>
            <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", fontSize: 34, color: "#f5f0e8", margin: 0, letterSpacing: 2 }}>I NOSTRI PRINCIPI</h2>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(190px, 1fr))", gap: 20 }}>
            {[
              { icon: "⚖️", t: "Indipendenti", d: "Nessun partito, nessun candidato. Solo il territorio e le persone." },
              { icon: "🌍", t: "Apartitica", d: "Pluralismo e confronto come metodo. Ogni voce conta." },
              { icon: "🤝", t: "No profit", d: "Ogni risorsa torna alla comunità. Zero secondi fini." },
              { icon: "🏘️", t: "Radicati", d: "Lavoriamo sul territorio, per il territorio e con il territorio." },
            ].map(v => (
              <div key={v.t} style={{ background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.02)", border: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.1)", borderRadius: 14, padding: "26px 18px", textAlign: "center" }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 30, marginBottom: 12 }}>{v.icon}</div>
                <div style={{ color: "#f5c800", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 14, marginBottom: 8, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{v.t}</div>
                <div style={{ color: "#4b5563", fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.65, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{v.d}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* TERRITORIO */}
      <div style={{ padding: "64px 24px" }}>
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 740, margin: "0 auto" }}>
          <div style={{ textAlign: "center", marginBottom: 40 }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#a78bfa", letterSpacing: 4, textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 10, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Il nostro campo d'azione</div>
            <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", fontSize: 32, color: "#f5f0e8", margin: "0 0 16px", letterSpacing: 2 }}>PIÙ CHE UN COMUNE</h2>
            <p style={{ color: "#6b7280", fontSize: 15, lineHeight: 1.8, fontFamily: "sans-serif", margin: 0 }}>
              N.E.X.T. nasce a Pontecagnano Faiano ma guarda al territorio nella sua interezza — frazioni, comuni limitrofi, comunità sparse. Perché i bisogni dei giovani non si fermano ai confini amministrativi.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr))", gap: 16 }}>
            {[
              { icon: "🎓", t: "Giovani e partecipazione", d: "Attivare chi non si sente rappresentato." },
              { icon: "🎨", t: "Cultura e identità", d: "Valorizzare le eccellenze locali in ogni forma." },
              { icon: "🔗", t: "Reti e connessioni", d: "Unire realtà frammentate per fare più rumore." },
              { icon: "🏙️", t: "Rigenerazione urbana", d: "Spazi pubblici vivi, co-progettati e condivisi." },
            ].map(v => (
              <div key={v.t} style={{ background: "rgba(124,58,237,0.06)", border: "1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.2)", borderRadius: 12, padding: "20px 18px" }}>
                <div style={{ fontSize: 22, marginBottom: 8 }}>{v.icon}</div>
                <div style={{ color: "#d8b4fe", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 13, marginBottom: 6, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{v.t}</div>
                <div style={{ color: "#4b5563", fontSize: 12, lineHeight: 1.6, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{v.d}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* FORUM */}
      <div style={{ padding: "0 24px 64px" }}>
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 640, margin: "0 auto" }}>
          <div style={{ background: "rgba(124,58,237,0.08)", border: "1px solid rgba(124,58,237,0.3)", borderRadius: 16, padding: "32px 28px", textAlign: "center" }}>
            <div style={{ fontSize: 28, marginBottom: 14 }}>🏛️</div>
            <h3 style={{ color: "#d8b4fe", fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", letterSpacing: 2, fontSize: 20, margin: "0 0 12px" }}>NEL FORUM DEI GIOVANI</h3>
            <p style={{ color: "#6b7280", lineHeight: 1.8, fontSize: 14, fontFamily: "sans-serif", margin: 0 }}>
              Presenti con <strong style={{ color: "#f5c800" }}>6 seggi su 16</strong> nel Forum dei Giovani di Pontecagnano Faiano.
              Come minoranza costruttiva, portiamo proposte concrete e rappresentiamo chi ci ha scelto con trasparenza e coerenza.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div style={{ borderTop: "1px solid #111", padding: "20px", textAlign: "center", color: "#1f1f1f", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>
        N.E.X.T. – Nuove Energie per il Territorio APS · Pontecagnano Faiano (SA) · 2026
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PAGINA BACHECA
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function BachecaPage({ posts, onNavigate, isAdmin }) {
  const [filtro, setFiltro] = useState("Tutti");
  const [detail, setDetail] = useState(null);
  const filtered = filtro === "Tutti" ? posts : posts.filter(p => p.tag === filtro);

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#080210" }}>
      <div style={{ background: "linear-gradient(180deg,#14003a 0%,#080210 100%)", padding: "36px 24px 28px", textAlign: "center", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.08)" }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 4, marginBottom: 8, textTransform: "uppercase", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Aggiornamenti</div>
        <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", fontSize: 34, color: "#f5f0e8", margin: "0 0 6px", letterSpacing: 3 }}>BACHECA N.E.X.T.</h1>
        <p style={{ color: "#4b5563", fontSize: 13, fontFamily: "sans-serif", margin: 0 }}>News, iniziative e comunicati dell'associazione</p>
        {isAdmin && (
          <div style={{ marginTop: 12, fontSize: 12, color: "#f5c800", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>
            ⚙️ Sei in modalità admin — <button onClick={() => onNavigate("admin")} style={{ background: "none", border: "none", color: "#f5c800", cursor: "pointer", textDecoration: "underline", fontSize: 12 }}>vai all'area admin</button> per aggiungere post
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div style={{ background: "#0a0a0a", borderBottom: "1px solid #111", padding: "10px 20px", overflowX: "auto" }}>
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 780, margin: "0 auto", display: "flex", gap: 6 }}>
          {TAGS.map(t => (
            <button key={t} onClick={() => setFiltro(t)} style={{
              background: filtro === t ? "#f5c800" : "transparent",
              color: filtro === t ? "#1a0030" : "#555",
              border: `1px solid ${filtro === t ? "#f5c800" : "#1e1e1e"}`,
              borderRadius: 20, padding: "4px 14px", fontSize: 11,
              fontWeight: filtro === t ? "bold" : "normal",
              cursor: "pointer", whiteSpace: "nowrap", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
            }}>{t}</button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      <main style={{ maxWidth: 780, margin: "0 auto", padding: "24px 16px 80px" }}>
        {filtered.length === 0 && <div style={{ textAlign: "center", color: "#222", padding: "60px 0", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Nessun post ancora.</div>}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 18 }}>
          {filtered.map((p, i) => (
            <article key={p.id} onClick={() => setDetail(p)} style={{
              background: "#0c0c0c", border: "1px solid #161616",
              borderLeft: `4px solid ${TAG_COLORS[p.tag] || "#f5c800"}`,
              borderRadius: 12, padding: "20px 22px", cursor: "pointer",
              animation: `fadeUp 0.4s ease ${i * 0.06}s both`,
              transition: "background 0.2s",
            }}
              onMouseEnter={e => e.currentTarget.style.background = "#111"}
              onMouseLeave={e => e.currentTarget.style.background = "#0c0c0c"}
            >
              <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: 10, flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 6 }}>
                <span style={{ background: TAG_COLORS[p.tag] || "#3b0764", color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: 20, fontFamily: "sans-serif", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 0.5 }}>{p.tag}</span>
                <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#333", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{p.data}</span>
              </div>
              <h2 style={{ margin: "0 0 8px", fontSize: 17, color: "#f0ebe8", lineHeight: 1.3, fontFamily: "Georgia, serif" }}>{p.titolo}</h2>
              <p style={{ color: "#444", lineHeight: 1.65, fontSize: 13, fontFamily: "sans-serif", margin: "0 0 12px", display: "-webkit-box", WebkitLineClamp: 2, WebkitBoxOrient: "vertical", overflow: "hidden" }}>{p.contenuto}</p>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#f5c800", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Leggi tutto →</span>
            </article>
          ))}
        </div>
      </main>

      {detail && (
        <div onClick={() => setDetail(null)} style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.92)", zIndex: 200, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 16 }}>
          <div onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()} style={{ background: "#0f0f0f", border: `2px solid ${TAG_COLORS[detail.tag] || "#f5c800"}`, borderRadius: 16, padding: "28px 24px", maxWidth: 560, width: "100%", maxHeight: "85vh", overflowY: "auto" }}>
            <span style={{ background: TAG_COLORS[detail.tag] || "#3b0764", color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, padding: "3px 10px", borderRadius: 20, fontFamily: "sans-serif", textTransform: "uppercase" }}>{detail.tag}</span>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: 20, margin: "14px 0 12px", color: "#f0ebe8", fontFamily: "Georgia, serif", lineHeight: 1.3 }}>{detail.titolo}</h2>
            <p style={{ color: "#888", lineHeight: 1.8, fontSize: 14, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{detail.contenuto}</p>
            <div style={{ marginTop: 20, display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: 8 }}>
              <span style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#333", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{detail.autore} · {detail.data}</span>
              <button onClick={() => setDetail(null)} style={{ background: "#f5c800", color: "#1a0030", border: "none", borderRadius: 8, padding: "8px 20px", fontWeight: "bold", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 13 }}>Chiudi</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <style>{`@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}`}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PAGINA TEAM
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function TeamPage({ team, onNavigate, isAdmin }) {
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null);
  const direttivo = team.filter(m => !m.ruolo.includes("fondatore"));
  const fondatori = team.filter(m => m.ruolo.includes("fondatore"));

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#080210" }}>
      <div style={{ background: "linear-gradient(180deg,#14003a 0%,#080210 100%)", padding: "36px 24px 28px", textAlign: "center", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.08)" }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 4, marginBottom: 8, textTransform: "uppercase", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Soci Fondatori</div>
        <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", fontSize: 34, color: "#f5f0e8", margin: "0 0 6px", letterSpacing: 3 }}>IL TEAM N.E.X.T.</h1>
        <p style={{ color: "#4b5563", fontSize: 13, fontFamily: "sans-serif", margin: 0 }}>10 persone, una visione, un territorio</p>
        {isAdmin && <div style={{ marginTop: 10, fontSize: 12, color: "#f5c800", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>⚙️ Vai all'<button onClick={() => onNavigate("admin")} style={{ background: "none", border: "none", color: "#f5c800", cursor: "pointer", textDecoration: "underline", fontSize: 12 }}>area admin</button> per modificare i profili</div>}
      </div>

      <main style={{ maxWidth: 860, margin: "0 auto", padding: "32px 16px 80px" }}>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 3, textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 18, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>— Consiglio Direttivo</div>
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr))", gap: 16, marginBottom: 48 }}>
          {direttivo.map((m, i) => (
            <MemberCard key={m.nome} m={m} i={i} onClick={() => setSelected(m)} />
          ))}
        </div>
        <div style={{ fontSize: 10, color: "#a78bfa", letterSpacing: 3, textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 18, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>— Soci Fondatori</div>
        <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit, minmax(160px, 1fr))", gap: 14 }}>
          {fondatori.map((m, i) => (
            <MemberCard key={m.nome} m={m} i={i} small onClick={() => setSelected(m)} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </main>

      {selected && (
        <div onClick={() => setSelected(null)} style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, background: "rgba(0,0,0,0.92)", zIndex: 200, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 16 }}>
          <div onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()} style={{ background: "#0f0f0f", border: `2px solid ${RUOLO_COLORS[selected.ruolo] || "#f5c800"}`, borderRadius: 16, padding: "28px 24px", maxWidth: 420, width: "100%", textAlign: "center" }}>
            <div style={{ width: 70, height: 70, borderRadius: "50%", margin: "0 auto 14px", background: `${RUOLO_COLORS[selected.ruolo] || "#f5c800"}18`, border: `2px solid ${RUOLO_COLORS[selected.ruolo] || "#f5c800"}`, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: 28 }}>👤</div>
            <h2 style={{ color: "#f0ebe8", margin: "0 0 8px", fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontSize: 18 }}>{selected.nome}</h2>
            <span style={{ background: RUOLO_COLORS[selected.ruolo] || "#374151", color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, padding: "3px 12px", borderRadius: 20, fontFamily: "sans-serif", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 1 }}>{selected.ruolo}</span>
            <p style={{ color: selected.bio ? "#888" : "#2a2a2a", fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "16px 0 20px", fontStyle: selected.bio ? "normal" : "italic" }}>
              {selected.bio || "Nessuna biografia ancora."}
            </p>
            <button onClick={() => setSelected(null)} style={{ background: "#f5c800", color: "#1a0030", border: "none", borderRadius: 8, padding: "10px 28px", fontWeight: "bold", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: 14 }}>Chiudi</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <style>{`@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(16px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}`}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

function MemberCard({ m, i, small, onClick }) {
  const [hover, setHover] = useState(false);
  return (
    <div onClick={onClick} onMouseEnter={() => setHover(true)} onMouseLeave={() => setHover(false)} style={{
      background: hover ? "#111" : "#0c0c0c",
      border: `1px solid ${hover ? (RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#f5c800") : "#161616"}`,
      borderRadius: 12, padding: small ? "18px 14px" : "22px 16px",
      textAlign: "center", cursor: "pointer",
      transform: hover ? "translateY(-3px)" : "none",
      transition: "all 0.2s",
      animation: `fadeUp 0.4s ease ${i * 0.07}s both`,
    }}>
      <div style={{ width: small ? 44 : 56, height: small ? 44 : 56, borderRadius: "50%", margin: "0 auto 12px", background: `${RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#374151"}18`, border: `1.5px solid ${RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#222"}`, display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: small ? 18 : 22 }}>👤</div>
      <div style={{ color: "#f0ebe8", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: small ? 12 : 13, lineHeight: 1.3, marginBottom: 5, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{m.nome}</div>
      <div style={{ fontSize: 9, color: RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#555", textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 1, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{m.ruolo}</div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PAGINA ADMIN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function AdminPage({ isAdmin, onLogin, posts, setPosts, team, setTeam }) {
  const [input, setInput] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState(false);
  const [tab, setTab] = useState("posts"); // posts | team | settings
  const [postForm, setPostForm] = useState({ titolo: "", contenuto: "", tag: "Associazione" });
  const [editPost, setEditPost] = useState(null);
  const [editMember, setEditMember] = useState(null);
  const [memberForm, setMemberForm] = useState({ nome: "", ruolo: "", bio: "" });
  const [newMemberForm, setNewMemberForm] = useState({ nome: "", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" });
  const [showNewMember, setShowNewMember] = useState(false);

  if (!isAdmin) return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#080210", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", padding: 24 }}>
      <div style={{ background: "#0f0f0f", border: "1px solid #222", borderRadius: 16, padding: "40px 32px", maxWidth: 380, width: "100%", textAlign: "center" }}>
        <MegafonoIcon size={52} />
        <h2 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", color: "#f5c800", letterSpacing: 2, fontSize: 22, margin: "16px 0 8px" }}>AREA ADMIN</h2>
        <p style={{ color: "#444", fontSize: 13, fontFamily: "sans-serif", marginBottom: 24 }}>Accesso riservato al team N.E.X.T.</p>
        <input
          type="password" placeholder="Inserisci il codice admin"
          value={input} onChange={e => { setInput(e.target.value); setError(false); }}
          onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === "Enter") { if (input === ADMIN_CODE) { onLogin(); setError(false); } else setError(true); } }}
          style={{ width: "100%", padding: "12px 16px", borderRadius: 10, background: "#1a1a1a", border: `1px solid ${error ? "#dc2626" : "#2a2a2a"}`, color: "#f5f0e8", fontSize: 15, boxSizing: "border-box", outline: "none", marginBottom: 8, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}
        />
        {error && <div style={{ color: "#dc2626", fontSize: 12, marginBottom: 8, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Codice errato. Riprova.</div>}
        <button onClick={() => { if (input === ADMIN_CODE) { onLogin(); setError(false); } else setError(true); }} style={{ width: "100%", padding: "12px", borderRadius: 10, background: "#f5c800", color: "#1a0030", border: "none", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 15, cursor: "pointer", marginTop: 4 }}>
          Accedi
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <div style={{ minHeight: "100vh", background: "#080210" }}>
      <div style={{ background: "linear-gradient(180deg,#14003a 0%,#080210 100%)", padding: "32px 24px 24px", borderBottom: "1px solid rgba(245,200,0,0.08)" }}>
        <div style={{ maxWidth: 860, margin: "0 auto" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: 12, marginBottom: 20 }}>
            <MegafonoIcon size={32} />
            <div>
              <h1 style={{ fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", fontSize: 26, color: "#f5c800", margin: 0, letterSpacing: 2 }}>AREA ADMIN</h1>
              <div style={{ fontSize: 11, color: "#4b5563", fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>Pannello di gestione N.E.X.T.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6 }}>
            {[{ k: "posts", l: "📋 Post" }, { k: "team", l: "👥 Team" }].map(({ k, l }) => (
              <button key={k} onClick={() => setTab(k)} style={{
                background: tab === k ? "#f5c800" : "transparent",
                color: tab === k ? "#1a0030" : "#666",
                border: `1px solid ${tab === k ? "#f5c800" : "#222"}`,
                borderRadius: 8, padding: "7px 18px", fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer",
                fontWeight: tab === k ? "bold" : "normal", fontFamily: "sans-serif",
              }}>{l}</button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <main style={{ maxWidth: 860, margin: "0 auto", padding: "28px 16px 80px" }}>

        {/* ── TAB POSTS ── */}
        {tab === "posts" && (
          <div>
            {/* FORM NUOVO POST */}
            <div style={{ background: "#0c0c0c", border: "1px solid #1a1a1a", borderRadius: 14, padding: "24px", marginBottom: 32 }}>
              <h3 style={{ color: "#f5c800", fontFamily: "Impact, sans-serif", letterSpacing: 1, fontSize: 18, margin: "0 0 20px" }}>+ NUOVO POST</h3>
              <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 160px", gap: 12, marginBottom: 12 }}>
                <div>
                  <label style={lbl}>Titolo</label>
                  <input value={postForm.titolo} onChange={e => setPostForm({ ...postForm, titolo: e.target.value })}
                    placeholder="Titolo del post..."
                    style={inp} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label style={lbl}>Categoria</label>
                  <select value={postForm.tag} onChange={e => setPostForm({ ...postForm, tag: e.target.value })} style={inp}>
                    {TAGS.filter(t => t !== "Tutti").map(t => <option key={t}>{t}</option>)}
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
                <label style={lbl}>Contenuto</label>
                <textarea value={postForm.contenuto} onChange={e => setPostForm({ ...postForm, contenuto: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="Scrivi il comunicato o l'aggiornamento..."
                  rows={4} style={{ ...inp, resize: "vertical", fontFamily: "Georgia, serif" }} />
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  if (!postForm.titolo || !postForm.contenuto) return;
                  setPosts([{ id: Date.now(), ...postForm, data: new Date().toLocaleDateString("it-IT", { day: "numeric", month: "long", year: "numeric" }), autore: "Team N.E.X.T." }, ...posts]);
                  setPostForm({ titolo: "", contenuto: "", tag: "Associazione" });
                }}
                disabled={!postForm.titolo || !postForm.contenuto}
                style={{ ...btn, opacity: postForm.titolo && postForm.contenuto ? 1 : 0.4 }}
              >Pubblica post</button>
            </div>

            {/* LISTA POST */}
            <h3 style={{ color: "#555", fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, textTransform: "uppercase", marginBottom: 16 }}>Post pubblicati ({posts.length})</h3>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 12 }}>
              {posts.map(p => (
                <div key={p.id} style={{ background: "#0c0c0c", border: "1px solid #161616", borderLeft: `3px solid ${TAG_COLORS[p.tag] || "#f5c800"}`, borderRadius: 10, padding: "16px 18px" }}>
                  {editPost?.id === p.id ? (
                    <div>
                      <input value={editPost.titolo} onChange={e => setEditPost({ ...editPost, titolo: e.target.value })} style={{ ...inp, marginBottom: 8 }} />
                      <textarea value={editPost.contenuto} onChange={e => setEditPost({ ...editPost, contenuto: e.target.value })} rows={3} style={{ ...inp, resize: "vertical", marginBottom: 10, fontFamily: "Georgia, serif" }} />
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                        <button onClick={() => { setPosts(posts.map(x => x.id === editPost.id ? editPost : x)); setEditPost(null); }} style={btn}>Salva</button>
                        <button onClick={() => setEditPost(null)} style={btnGhost}>Annulla</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: 12 }}>
                      <div style={{ flex: 1 }}>
                        <span style={{ background: TAG_COLORS[p.tag] || "#3b0764", color: "#fff", fontSize: 9, padding: "2px 8px", borderRadius: 10, fontFamily: "sans-serif", textTransform: "uppercase" }}>{p.tag}</span>
                        <div style={{ color: "#d0ccc8", fontSize: 14, fontFamily: "sans-serif", marginTop: 6, fontWeight: "bold" }}>{p.titolo}</div>
                        <div style={{ color: "#333", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "sans-serif", marginTop: 2 }}>{p.data}</div>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, flexShrink: 0 }}>
                        <button onClick={() => setEditPost(p)} style={btnSm}>Modifica</button>
                        <button onClick={() => setPosts(posts.filter(x => x.id !== p.id))} style={{ ...btnSm, color: "#dc2626", borderColor: "#dc2626" }}>Elimina</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ── TAB TEAM ── */}
        {tab === "team" && (
          <div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", marginBottom: 20 }}>
              <h3 style={{ color: "#555", fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontSize: 12, letterSpacing: 2, textTransform: "uppercase", margin: 0 }}>Membri ({team.length})</h3>
              <button onClick={() => setShowNewMember(!showNewMember)} style={btn}>+ Aggiungi membro</button>
            </div>

            {showNewMember && (
              <div style={{ background: "#0c0c0c", border: "1px solid #1a1a1a", borderRadius: 12, padding: "20px", marginBottom: 24 }}>
                <h4 style={{ color: "#f5c800", fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontSize: 14, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>Nuovo membro</h4>
                <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 10, marginBottom: 10 }}>
                  <div><label style={lbl}>Nome completo</label><input value={newMemberForm.nome} onChange={e => setNewMemberForm({ ...newMemberForm, nome: e.target.value })} placeholder="Nome Cognome" style={inp} /></div>
                  <div><label style={lbl}>Ruolo</label><input value={newMemberForm.ruolo} onChange={e => setNewMemberForm({ ...newMemberForm, ruolo: e.target.value })} placeholder="es. Socio fondatore" style={inp} /></div>
                </div>
                <div style={{ marginBottom: 12 }}><label style={lbl}>Bio</label><textarea value={newMemberForm.bio} onChange={e => setNewMemberForm({ ...newMemberForm, bio: e.target.value })} rows={2} placeholder="Breve presentazione..." style={{ ...inp, resize: "vertical" }} /></div>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                  <button onClick={() => { if (!newMemberForm.nome) return; setTeam([...team, newMemberForm]); setNewMemberForm({ nome: "", ruolo: "Socio fondatore", bio: "" }); setShowNewMember(false); }} style={btn}>Aggiungi</button>
                  <button onClick={() => setShowNewMember(false)} style={btnGhost}>Annulla</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: 10 }}>
              {team.map((m, idx) => (
                <div key={m.nome + idx} style={{ background: "#0c0c0c", border: "1px solid #161616", borderLeft: `3px solid ${RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#374151"}`, borderRadius: 10, padding: "14px 18px" }}>
                  {editMember?.idx === idx ? (
                    <div>
                      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: 10, marginBottom: 10 }}>
                        <div><label style={lbl}>Nome</label><input value={memberForm.nome} onChange={e => setMemberForm({ ...memberForm, nome: e.target.value })} style={inp} /></div>
                        <div><label style={lbl}>Ruolo</label><input value={memberForm.ruolo} onChange={e => setMemberForm({ ...memberForm, ruolo: e.target.value })} style={inp} /></div>
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ marginBottom: 10 }}><label style={lbl}>Bio</label><textarea value={memberForm.bio} onChange={e => setMemberForm({ ...memberForm, bio: e.target.value })} rows={2} style={{ ...inp, resize: "vertical" }} /></div>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 8 }}>
                        <button onClick={() => { setTeam(team.map((x, i) => i === idx ? memberForm : x)); setEditMember(null); }} style={btn}>Salva</button>
                        <button onClick={() => setEditMember(null)} style={btnGhost}>Annulla</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", gap: 12 }}>
                      <div>
                        <span style={{ color: RUOLO_COLORS[m.ruolo] || "#555", fontSize: 9, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 1, fontFamily: "sans-serif" }}>{m.ruolo}</span>
                        <div style={{ color: "#d0ccc8", fontSize: 14, fontFamily: "sans-serif", fontWeight: "bold" }}>{m.nome}</div>
                        {m.bio && <div style={{ color: "#333", fontSize: 11, fontFamily: "sans-serif", marginTop: 2 }}>{m.bio.slice(0, 60)}{m.bio.length > 60 ? "…" : ""}</div>}
                      </div>
                      <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: 6, flexShrink: 0 }}>
                        <button onClick={() => { setEditMember({ idx }); setMemberForm({ nome: m.nome, ruolo: m.ruolo, bio: m.bio }); }} style={btnSm}>Modifica</button>
                        <button onClick={() => setTeam(team.filter((_, i) => i !== idx))} style={{ ...btnSm, color: "#dc2626", borderColor: "#dc2626" }}>Rimuovi</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

// stili condivisi admin
const lbl = { fontSize: 10, color: "#555", fontFamily: "sans-serif", display: "block", marginBottom: 4, textTransform: "uppercase", letterSpacing: 1 };
const inp = { width: "100%", padding: "9px 12px", borderRadius: 8, background: "#141414", border: "1px solid #222", color: "#f0ebe8", fontSize: 13, boxSizing: "border-box", outline: "none", fontFamily: "sans-serif" };
const btn = { background: "#f5c800", color: "#1a0030", border: "none", borderRadius: 8, padding: "9px 20px", fontWeight: "bold", fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "sans-serif" };
const btnGhost = { background: "transparent", color: "#555", border: "1px solid #222", borderRadius: 8, padding: "9px 18px", fontSize: 13, cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "sans-serif" };
const btnSm = { background: "transparent", color: "#f5c800", border: "1px solid #2a2a2a", borderRadius: 6, padding: "5px 12px", fontSize: 11, cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "sans-serif" };

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP ROOT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
export default function App() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState("home");
  const [isAdmin, setIsAdmin] = useState(false);
  const [posts, setPosts] = useState(INITIAL_POSTS);
  const [team, setTeam] = useState(INITIAL_TEAM);

  return (
    <>
      <style>{`
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body { background: #080210; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 5px; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: #080210; }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #f5c800; border-radius: 3px; }
        @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(16px); } to { opacity:1; transform:none; } }
      `}</style>
      <Nav page={page} onNavigate={setPage} isAdmin={isAdmin} />
      {page === "home" && <HomePage onNavigate={setPage} />}
      {page === "bacheca" && <BachecaPage posts={posts} onNavigate={setPage} isAdmin={isAdmin} />}
      {page === "team" && <TeamPage team={team} onNavigate={setPage} isAdmin={isAdmin} />}
      {page === "admin" && (
        <AdminPage
          isAdmin={isAdmin} onLogin={() => setIsAdmin(true)}
          posts={posts} setPosts={setPosts}
          team={team} setTeam={setTeam}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}
